description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image globally but overrides it to node:8 for the build-project job. Define a single job called build-project (default stage) that runs only on the master and develop branches. The job caches the node_modules directory, then executes the shell commands: apt-get install git, npm install -g bower grunt-cli, npm install, bower install --allow-root, and grunt. After the build, it uploads the coverage/, doc/, and dist/ directories as artifacts that expire after 1 day.
